scripts.build: algokit compile ts smart_contracts --output-source-map --out-dir artifacts && algokit generate client smart_contracts/artifacts -v 7.0.0-beta.3 --output {app_spec_dir}/{contract_name}Client.ts
scripts.build:appregistry: algokit compile ts smart_contracts/app-registry --output-source-map --out-dir ../artifacts/app-registry && algokit generate client smart_contracts/artifacts/app-registry --output {app_spec_dir}/{contract_name}Client.ts
